title: Philanthropic Funds for Research and Other Sponsored Programs — D-RED Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-09-13 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Philanthropic Funds for Research and Other Sponsored Programs' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Distinguishes philanthropic funding from sponsored project funding and explains how each interacts with MSU's research administration processes. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/L_a9KiLFYl3xZFd2GkfkEtbJTCV-rIbnV3bOmxnBO2Ckg4wqopNuk6gFubhtiCej.a7z3Ugr1GSfQ-oYL
